name: 02 Enrich — Decision-Makers
description: For projects.status='new', searches LinkedIn via serper for decision-makers, extracts name/title with OpenAI mini, upserts companies/contacts/leads, advances project status to enriched. No Hunter.

parameters.query: SELECT id, owner_company, gc_company, earthworks_sub, name FROM projects WHERE status = 'new' AND owner_company IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT 10

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The person's full name as it appears in the LinkedIn search result (e.g. 'Jane Smith'). Leave empty if the result is a company page, article, or not clearly a real person's profile.

attributes.name: job_title
attributes.description: The person's job title at the company (e.g. 'VP Construction'). Leave empty if not stated.

attributes.name: company_match
attributes.description: The company name the person is shown to work at, exactly as in the result. Leave empty if the result is unrelated to the target company.

options.systemPromptTemplate: You extract a single person's identity from a LinkedIn search result (title + snippet). Extract a value ONLY when it is explicitly present in the text — never invent names, titles, or companies. If the result is a company page, an article, a directory, or otherwise not a specific real person's profile, leave all fields empty.

parameters.query: WITH input AS (SELECT ($1::jsonb) AS d), c_up AS (INSERT INTO companies (name, role) SELECT (d->>'owner_company'), 'owner'::company_role FROM input ON CONFLICT (name, role) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name RETURNING id), ct_in AS (INSERT INTO contacts (company_id, name, title, persona, linkedin_url, source) SELECT c_up.id, (d->>'contact_name'), (d->>'contact_title'), NULLIF(d->>'persona',''), (d->>'contact_linkedin'), 'serp.dev' FROM c_up, input RETURNING id, company_id) INSERT INTO leads (project_id, company_id, contact_id, status) SELECT (d->>'project_id')::bigint, ct_in.company_id, ct_in.id, 'enriched'::lead_status FROM ct_in, input ON CONFLICT (project_id, company_id, contact_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING id, project_id
INSERT INTO runs (workflow, finished_at, items_out, notes) VALUES ('02_enrich', now(), $1, 'enrich run')
UPDATE projects SET status = 'enriched' WHERE id = ANY(string_to_array($1, '|')::bigint[])

UPDATE companies SET domain = COALESCE(NULLIF(($1::jsonb)->>'domain',''), domain), linkedin_url = COALESCE(NULLIF(($1::jsonb)->>'linkedin_url',''), linkedin_url), industry = COALESCE(NULLIF(($1::jsonb)->>'industry',''), industry), hq_location = COALESCE(NULLIF(($1::jsonb)->>'hq_location',''), hq_location), size = COALESCE(NULLIF(($1::jsonb)->>'size',''), size) WHERE name = (($1::jsonb)->>'company') AND role = 'owner'

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({domain: $json.domain, linkedin_url: $json.linkedin_company_url, industry: $json.industry, hq_location: $json.hq_location, size: $json.size, company: $json.owner_company}) }}
